controls.name: lookup-table substitution
controls.construction: retain selected states or outputs while deleting explicit transitions, dependencies, and material history
controls.protected_distinction: process, dependency, and historical commitment structure
controls.applicability: at least one protected P4, P5, or P7 distinction is material and nonempty
controls.false_positive_risk: an empty or inapplicable process/history axis must be reported not_applicable rather than rejected
controls.false_negative_risk: an output-only verifier may accept the substituted process

controls.name: dependency collapse
controls.construction: map source-distinct support and defeat or other dependency roles to one target role
controls.protected_distinction: typed dependency identity and relation reflection
controls.applicability: the source declares at least two materially distinct dependency roles
controls.false_positive_risk: source-declared equivalent roles must not be treated as distinct
controls.false_negative_risk: a verifier that checks only relation existence may miss role collapse

controls.name: history erasure
controls.construction: retain source-indexed states while deleting order, revision, modification, ancestry, and path records
controls.protected_distinction: material history, revision, and path dependence
controls.applicability: the source contains a material P7 order, revision, modification, ancestry, or path distinction
controls.false_positive_risk: a genuinely history-free source must be not_applicable
controls.false_negative_risk: final-state comparison can conceal path erasure

controls.name: hidden rule modification
controls.construction: supply an undeclared operational rule override outside the completed target and machinery ledger
controls.protected_distinction: explicit operational rule change and machinery accountability
controls.applicability: the substituted behavior changes a material transition or rule-version result
controls.false_positive_risk: fully declared and costed rule machinery is not hidden
controls.false_negative_risk: runtime behavior outside the package may escape a purely static checker

controls.name: label-only semantics
controls.construction: replace a source-owned denotation with an identifier or display label
controls.protected_distinction: semantic agreement independent of lexical naming
controls.applicability: the source declares a material denotation or semantic equivalence
controls.false_positive_risk: a label may coincidentally equal a denotation but cannot be accepted solely for that reason
controls.false_negative_risk: manual semantic review may be required for opaque denotations

controls.name: unrestricted interpreter
controls.construction: add an unrestricted external interpreter as an uncharged recovery dependency
controls.protected_distinction: target-only uniform recovery and full machinery accounting
controls.applicability: the external interpreter supplies material information or behavior absent from the admitted target
controls.false_positive_risk: a fixed declared and fully costed algorithm is not an unrestricted hidden interpreter
controls.false_negative_risk: an external dependency may be disguised as a library or environment assumption

controls.name: hidden auxiliary state
controls.construction: remove a protected target relation and store it in an undeclared side channel
controls.protected_distinction: image accountability and declared information location
controls.applicability: the relocated distinction is material under the source contract
controls.false_positive_risk: declared target fields and counted helper structures are not hidden state
controls.false_negative_risk: side channels outside the execution envelope may evade detection

controls.name: provenance deletion
controls.construction: delete target and history provenance while retaining conclusions and other records
controls.protected_distinction: material justificatory, historical, and evidential provenance
controls.applicability: the source marks at least one provenance relation or evidential source as material
controls.false_negative_risk: conclusion-only validation may ignore provenance loss

controls.name: output-equivalent process substitution
controls.construction: retain state and transition endpoints while replacing material preconditions and dependencies
controls.protected_distinction: process, dependency, consequence, and path equivalence beyond output equality
controls.applicability: the source declares material process or dependency structure beyond terminal output
controls.false_positive_risk: source-declared process equivalence must be honored
controls.false_negative_risk: endpoint-only bisimulation checks can accept the substitute

controls.name: primitive smuggling
controls.construction: remove explicit interpretation data and relocate its function into correspondence metadata
controls.applicability: the relocated function is used by construction, interpretation, recovery, or verification
controls.false_positive_risk: declared derived machinery is allowed when explicitly counted
controls.false_negative_risk: equivalent functionality may be distributed across several innocuous-looking fields

nonclaims: the ten canonical fixtures exhaust each control family
